top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT PostHistoryTypeId) 
     FROM postHistory 
     WHERE PostId = 3720) AS post_history_type_ids,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT UserId) 
     FROM comments 
     WHERE PostId = 3720) AS unique_commenters_count;

SELECT 
    (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT PostHistoryTypeId) 
     FROM postHistory 
     WHERE PostId = 3720) AS post_history_type_ids,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT UserId) 
     FROM comments 
     WHERE PostId = 3720) AS unique_commenters;

SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ph.PostHistoryTypeId) AS post_history_type_ids,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.UserId) AS unique_commenters
FROM posts p
LEFT JOIN postHistory ph ON ph.PostId = p.Id AND p.Id = 3720
LEFT JOIN comments c ON c.PostId = p.Id AND p.Id = 3720
WHERE p.Id = 3720
GROUP BY p.Id;

SELECT 
    (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT PostHistoryTypeId) 
     FROM postHistory 
     WHERE PostId = 3720) AS post_history_type_ids,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT UserId) 
     FROM comments 
     WHERE PostId = 3720) AS unique_commenters_count;

    COUNT(DISTINCT c.UserId) AS unique_commenters_count
FROM posts p
LEFT JOIN postHistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId AND ph.PostId = 3720
LEFT JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId AND c.PostId = 3720
WHERE p.Id = 3720;

SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ph.PostHistoryTypeId) AS post_history_type_ids,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.UserId) AS unique_commenters
FROM posts p
LEFT JOIN postHistory ph ON ph.PostId = p.Id AND p.Id = 3720
LEFT JOIN comments c ON c.PostId = p.Id AND p.Id = 3720
WHERE p.Id = 3720
GROUP BY p.Id;

SELECT 
    (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT PostHistoryTypeId) 
     FROM postHistory 
     WHERE PostId = 3720) AS post_history_type_ids,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT UserId) 
     FROM comments 
     WHERE PostId = 3720) AS unique_commenters_count;

SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ph.PostHistoryTypeId) AS post_history_type_ids,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.UserId) AS unique_commenters
FROM posts p
LEFT JOIN postHistory ph ON ph.PostId = p.Id
LEFT JOIN comments c ON c.PostId = p.Id
WHERE p.Id = 3720
GROUP BY p.Id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ph.PostHistoryTypeId) AS post_history_type_ids,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.UserId) AS unique_commenters
FROM posts p
LEFT JOIN postHistory ph ON ph.PostId = p.Id AND p.Id = 3720
LEFT JOIN comments c ON c.PostId = p.Id AND p.Id = 3720
WHERE p.Id = 3720
GROUP BY p.Id;
